name: quioteframework/db-eloquent
description: Eloquent (illuminate/database) driver adapter for Quiote's database layer.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/db-eloquent/ (docs/MONOREPO_SPLIT_PLAN.md); split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
